instructions.name: add_beneficiary
docs: Add a beneficiary to the vault.
Vault must be unlocked. Shares must not exceed 10,000 bps total.

instructions.name: add_guardian
docs: Register a guardian wallet (max 3 per vault).
Only the owner can add guardians. Cannot be called during an active countdown.

accounts.name: guardian_config
docs: GuardianConfig PDA — created on the first add_guardian call, reused thereafter.

accounts.name: guardian_wallet
docs: The wallet to register as a guardian. Does not need to sign.

instructions.name: close_vault
docs: Owner closes the vault and reclaims all lamports.
Cannot be called while a countdown is active.

instructions.name: create_vault
docs: Create a new inheritance vault.
Sets heartbeat interval, countdown duration, dispute window, and optional message hash.
Vault starts unlocked so beneficiaries can be added.

instructions.name: dispute
docs: Owner disputes a false activation within the dispute window.
Resets the countdown and refreshes the heartbeat timestamp.

instructions.name: execute_inheritance
docs: Beneficiary claims their proportional share of a delegated SPL token.
Only callable after countdown_duration has elapsed since trigger.
Tokens transfer directly from the owner's wallet to the beneficiary.

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: The vault owner's token account — still in their wallet, never moved.

accounts.name: beneficiary
docs: Beneficiary PDA — seeded by [beneficiary, vault, beneficiary_wallet].

accounts.name: beneficiary_ata
docs: Beneficiary's ATA for this mint (destination) — created if absent.
Payer is the caller (keeper), not the beneficiary.

accounts.name: beneficiary_wallet
docs: Destination wallet — must match beneficiary.wallet stored on-chain.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Fee payer — anyone can call this (keeper bot, relayer, anyone).
They pay the tiny transaction fee and ATA creation rent if needed.
Funds always go to beneficiary_wallet regardless of who the caller is.

instructions.name: execute_sol_inheritance
docs: Beneficiary claims their proportional share of the designated SOL.
Only callable after countdown_duration has elapsed since trigger.

accounts.name: beneficiary
docs: Beneficiary PDA — seeded by [beneficiary, vault, beneficiary_wallet].

accounts.name: beneficiary_wallet
docs: Destination wallet — must match beneficiary.wallet stored on-chain.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Fee payer — anyone can call this (keeper bot, relayer, anyone).
They pay the tiny transaction fee (~0.000005 SOL). Funds still go
to beneficiary_wallet regardless of who the caller is.

instructions.name: guardian_heartbeat
docs: A registered guardian casts a liveness vote.
When GUARDIAN_QUORUM (2) unique guardians vote, the vault heartbeat is reset
and any active countdown is cancelled.

accounts.name: guardian
docs: A registered guardian signing the liveness vote.

instructions.name: heartbeat
docs: Owner check-in — proves the owner is alive and resets the heartbeat timer.
If passkey is registered, the transaction must include a secp256r1 verify
instruction signed with the owner's biometric (Face ID / Touch ID).
If called during an active countdown (within dispute window), cancels the countdown.

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar — only inspected when vault.passkey_required == true.

instructions.name: lock_vault
docs: Lock the vault. Shares must total exactly 10,000 bps.
After locking, no beneficiary changes are allowed.

instructions.name: recover_with_passkey
docs: Recover vault ownership using only a passkey biometric signature.
The transaction must include a secp256r1 verify instruction (ix[n-1])
signed over sha256(vault || new_owner || recent_blockhash) with the
registered passkey. No guardian quorum needed — the biometric is proof enough.

accounts.name: new_owner
docs: The new Solana wallet that will become the vault owner (pays for alias PDA rent).

accounts.name: vault_alias
docs: Alias PDA: seeds = ["vault_alias", new_owner].

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar — used to inspect the secp256r1 verify ix.

instructions.name: register_delegation
docs: Designate SPL tokens for inheritance without moving them from your wallet.
Creates a DelegationRecord PDA and calls spl_token::approve so this program
can transfer on your behalf only when the countdown conditions are met.
Vault must be locked before delegations can be registered.

accounts.name: delegation_record
docs: One delegation record per (vault, mint) pair.

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's ATA for this mint — the `approve` will be set on this account.

instructions.name: register_passkey
docs: Register a P-256 passkey public key for biometric heartbeat verification.
Once set, every heartbeat must be accompanied by a secp256r1 signature
produced by the owner's device biometric (Face ID / Touch ID).

instructions.name: register_recovery_wallet
docs: Register a backup recovery wallet.
If the owner ever loses their Solana keypair, this wallet (combined with
guardian quorum) can authorise an ownership transfer.

instructions.name: register_sol_delegation
docs: Designate native SOL for inheritance.
SOL is transferred into a SolDelegation PDA (cannot be SPL-delegated).
The owner can revoke at any time via revoke_sol_delegation.

accounts.name: sol_delegation
docs: SOL delegation PDA — holds the lamports on behalf of the vault.

instructions.name: revoke_delegation
docs: Revoke an SPL token delegation. Cancels the spl_token::approve and
closes the DelegationRecord account, returning rent to the owner.
Can be called at any time while the vault is active.

accounts.name: delegation_record
docs: Delegation record to close — returns rent to owner.

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's ATA — the SPL approval will be revoked from this account.

instructions.name: revoke_sol_delegation
docs: Withdraw SOL from the SolDelegation PDA back to the owner's wallet.
This is the safety valve — no lockup, fully revocable while alive.

accounts.name: sol_delegation
docs: SolDelegation PDA — closed on revoke; lamports returned to owner.

instructions.name: transfer_ownership
docs: Transfer vault ownership to a new wallet.
Requires: (a) recovery_wallet signer matches vault.recovery_wallet,
(b) guardian quorum has been reached.
Creates a VaultAlias PDA so downstream instructions can still resolve
the vault via the new owner key.

accounts.name: recovery_wallet
docs: The pre-registered recovery wallet — must be the signer (pays for alias PDA rent).

accounts.name: vault_alias
docs: Alias PDA created at [b"vault_alias", new_owner_wallet].

instructions.name: trigger_countdown
docs: Trigger the countdown after a missed check-in.
Anyone can call this once the heartbeat interval has elapsed.
Vault must be locked.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can trigger — no signer restriction.

errors.name: VaultNotActive
errors.msg: Vault is not active

errors.name: VaultAlreadyLocked
errors.msg: Vault is already locked and cannot be modified

errors.name: VaultNotLocked
errors.msg: Vault must be locked before countdown can be triggered

errors.name: SharesNotComplete
errors.msg: Vault shares must total exactly 10000 basis points (100%) before locking

errors.name: SharesOverflow
errors.msg: Adding this beneficiary would exceed 10000 basis points total

errors.name: ZeroShares
errors.msg: Share amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: MaxBeneficiariesReached
errors.msg: Maximum of 10 beneficiaries allowed per vault

errors.name: HeartbeatNotElapsed
errors.msg: Heartbeat interval has not elapsed yet — owner is still active

errors.name: CountdownAlreadyStarted
errors.msg: Countdown has already been triggered

errors.name: CountdownNotStarted
errors.msg: Countdown has not been triggered yet

errors.name: DisputeWindowNotElapsed
errors.msg: Dispute window has not elapsed yet — countdown is still active

errors.name: DisputeWindowElapsed
errors.msg: Dispute window has already elapsed — vault cannot be disputed

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: This beneficiary has already claimed their share

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Vault has insufficient lamports to fulfil claim

errors.name: UnauthorizedOwner
errors.msg: Only the vault owner can perform this action

errors.name: UnauthorizedBeneficiary
errors.msg: Beneficiary wallet does not match this beneficiary account

errors.name: InvalidHeartbeatInterval
errors.msg: Heartbeat interval must be at least 1 hour (3600 seconds)

errors.name: InvalidCountdownDuration
errors.msg: Countdown duration must be at least 1 day (86400 seconds)

errors.name: InvalidDisputeWindow
errors.msg: Dispute window must be less than countdown duration

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: MaxGuardiansReached
errors.msg: Maximum of 3 guardians allowed per vault

errors.name: GuardianAlreadyExists
errors.msg: This wallet is already registered as a guardian

errors.name: NotAGuardian
errors.msg: Signer is not a registered guardian for this vault

errors.name: AlreadyVoted
errors.msg: This guardian has already voted in the current round

errors.name: NoRecoveryWallet
errors.msg: No recovery wallet is registered for this vault

errors.name: InvalidRecoveryWallet
errors.msg: Recovery wallet does not match the registered address

errors.name: GuardianQuorumNotReached
errors.msg: Guardian quorum has not been reached for this recovery

errors.name: PasskeyVerificationFailed
errors.msg: Passkey verification failed — biometric signature invalid

errors.name: InvalidPasskeyPubkey
errors.msg: Invalid passkey public key — must be 33-byte compressed P-256 point

errors.name: PasskeyRequired
errors.msg: Passkey is required for this vault's heartbeat

errors.name: NoPasskeyRegistered
errors.msg: No passkey registered for this vault

errors.name: MissingSecp256r1Instruction
errors.msg: secp256r1 verify instruction missing from transaction

errors.name: Secp256r1PubkeyMismatch
errors.msg: secp256r1 verify instruction references wrong public key

errors.name: DelegationAmountZero
errors.msg: Delegation amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidDelegationAccount
errors.msg: Delegation account does not match the registered token account

errors.name: NoSolDelegation
errors.msg: SOL delegation account not found for this vault

fields.name: share_bps
docs: Share in basis points (out of 10_000). e.g. 5000 = 50%.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this beneficiary belongs to.

fields.name: wallet
docs: The beneficiary's wallet address (receives the share).

fields.name: share_bps
docs: Share in basis points (out of 10_000).

fields.name: has_claimed
docs: Whether this beneficiary has already claimed their share.

fields.name: index
docs: Zero-indexed position (for PDA seed uniqueness if same wallet used twice — prevented by PDA).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: heartbeat_interval
docs: Seconds between required owner check-ins. Min: 3600 (1 hour).

fields.name: countdown_duration
docs: Seconds the countdown runs before beneficiaries can claim. Min: 86400 (1 day).

fields.name: dispute_window
docs: Seconds the owner can dispute a false activation. Must be < countdown_duration.

fields.name: message_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of the encrypted off-chain message. Pass [0u8; 32] for no message.

types.name: DelegationRecord
docs: Records that the vault owner has approved this program (via PDA delegation)
to transfer up to `approved_amount` of `token_mint` on their behalf.
Seeds: ["delegation", vault, token_mint]
The PDA address is the SPL delegate set via `spl_token::approve`.
It can only sign within this program and only when the countdown conditions
are satisfied in `execute_inheritance`.

fields.name: vault
docs: Parent vault.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: SPL mint being delegated.

fields.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's ATA for this mint — the token account that was `approve`d.

fields.name: approved_amount
docs: Amount approved via spl_token::approve.

fields.name: claimed_mask
docs: Bitmask: bit i = beneficiary at index i has claimed this mint.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: GuardianConfig
docs: Per-vault guardian configuration.
PDA seeds: `[b"guardian_config", vault.key().as_ref()]`
Stores up to 3 registered guardian wallets and tracks the current round
of votes. When GUARDIAN_QUORUM (2) unique guardians vote, the vault
heartbeat is reset and any active countdown is cancelled.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this config belongs to.

fields.name: guardians
docs: Registered guardian wallets (up to 3; Pubkey::default() padding).

fields.name: count
docs: Number of registered guardians (0–3).

fields.name: pending_votes
docs: How many unique votes have been cast in the current round.

fields.name: voters
docs: Which guardians have voted in the current round (zero-padded).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: amount
docs: How much of this token to designate for inheritance.

fields.name: passkey_pubkey
docs: Compressed P-256 (secp256r1) public key — 33 bytes.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of SOL to designate, in lamports.

types.name: SolDelegation
docs: Holds native SOL designated for inheritance.
Unlike SPL tokens (which stay in the owner's wallet via delegation),
native SOL cannot be delegated via the SPL token program, so it is
temporarily held in this PDA. The owner can `revoke_sol_delegation`
at any time to withdraw — it is NOT a lockup.
Seeds: ["sol_delegation", vault]

fields.name: vault
docs: Parent vault.

fields.name: amount
docs: Total SOL held (lamports), excluding rent.

fields.name: claimed_mask
docs: Bitmask: bit i = beneficiary at index i has claimed their share.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: owner
docs: The wallet that owns this vault and must send regular heartbeats.

fields.name: heartbeat_interval
docs: How often (in seconds) the owner must check in.
Default: 7_776_000 (90 days).

fields.name: last_heartbeat
docs: Unix timestamp of the last successful heartbeat.

fields.name: countdown_duration
docs: How long (in seconds) the dispute/countdown window lasts after
a missed heartbeat is detected. Default: 1_209_600 (14 days).

fields.name: countdown_started_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the countdown was triggered.
0 means no countdown is active.

fields.name: dispute_window
docs: How long (in seconds) the owner has to dispute a false activation
after countdown starts. Must be < countdown_duration.
Default: 604_800 (7 days).

fields.name: beneficiary_count
docs: Number of beneficiaries registered.

fields.name: total_shares_bps
docs: Sum of all beneficiary share_bps. Must equal TOTAL_SHARES_BPS
before the vault can be locked.

fields.name: is_locked
docs: Whether the vault has been locked (no more beneficiary changes).

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether the vault is active. Set to false after owner closes it.

fields.name: message_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of the encrypted final message stored off-chain
(Arweave / IPFS). Zero bytes = no message set.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: recovery_wallet
docs: Optional pre-registered recovery wallet.
If set, this wallet can co-sign a transfer_ownership instruction
alongside guardian consensus.
Pubkey::default() = not set.

fields.name: has_recovery_wallet
docs: Whether a recovery wallet has been registered.

fields.name: passkey_pubkey
docs: Compressed P-256 public key from the owner's passkey (33 bytes).
All-zero = no passkey registered.

fields.name: passkey_required
docs: Whether passkey verification is required for heartbeat.

types.name: VaultAlias
docs: A thin alias PDA created when vault ownership is transferred.
Seeds: ["vault_alias", current_owner_pubkey]
Points to the original vault PDA so all downstream instructions
can still resolve the vault even after the owner key changes.

fields.name: vault
docs: Address of the original vault PDA.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.
